semantic.role: Validation script for protocol assets in ArchSpine project
responsibilities: Schema loading and registration from schemas directory
Validation of JSON examples against their corresponding schemas using AJV
Validation of Markdown rule documents (with gray-matter frontmatter) against the rules schema
Reporting validation failures and exiting with appropriate status codes
outOfScope: Unit testing of the validation logic itself
Schema authoring guidelines or best practices

English.purpose: This script ensures that all protocol asset examples and rule documents in the ArchSpine project conform to their defined JSON schemas, maintaining data integrity and consistency.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for developers and maintainers who work with the .spine/atlas directory, schema definitions, and example files. It is typically run as part of the CI pipeline or during development to catch structural errors early.
key_takeaways: All JSON examples are mapped to specific schemas and validated automatically.
Markdown rule documents are parsed using gray-matter and validated against the spine-rules schema.
Any validation failure results in a non-zero exit code, making the script suitable for automated testing.
The script requires all schemas to be valid JSON Schema 2020-12 and uses ajv-formats for format validation.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 该脚本用于验证 ArchSpine 项目中所有协议资产示例和规则文档是否符合其定义的 JSON Schema，确保数据的完整性和一致性。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 适用于维护 .spine/atlas 目录、Schema 定义和示例文件的开发者和维护人员。通常在 CI 流水线或开发过程中运行，以便及早发现结构错误。
key_takeaways: 所有 JSON 示例都映射到特定的 Schema 并自动进行验证。
Markdown 规则文档通过 gray-matter 解析，提取元数据和正文，然后对照 spine-rules Schema 进行校验。
任何验证失败都会导致非零退出码，适合集成到自动化测试中。
脚本要求所有 Schema 均为有效的 JSON Schema 2020-12，并使用 ajv-formats 进行格式验证。
